markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, performance, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Review Process Overhaul:** To accelerate publishing, Redis will evaluate bypassing PMM/Brand reviews by end-of-month. The proposed model is to publish quickly, then conduct deep reviews only for articles exceeding a traffic threshold (e.g., 100 sessions/month).](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Strong Early Performance:** December's initial articles showed healthy traffic (e.g., `ContextRot` → 138 sessions), a positive signal given the holiday period. All new content was indexed successfully.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [**Reporting & Ops Updates:** The sync cadence shifts to biweekly to focus on strategy. Reporting will be enhanced with regional performance data and conversion tracking for key GA4 events (e.g., `os_book_a_meeting`).](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [**Publishing Process Refined:** GrowthX will self-serve blog images via shared Canva templates and retroactively add authors to all published articles, using the name of the PMM who conducted the review.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Publishing Process

  - [**Backlog:** 12 articles are in PMM review; 5 are in brand review.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**Goal:** Bypass PMM/Brand reviews by end-of-month to accelerate publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Proposed Model (based on Airbyte):**](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [Publish content quickly to gather performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [Conduct in-depth PMM reviews only for high-traffic articles (e.g., \>100 sessions/month) to ensure accuracy and optimize for conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**Publishing Requirements:**](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Blog Images:** GrowthX will self-serve via shared Canva templates.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [**Authorship:** Authors must be added to all articles in Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
          - [**Retroactive:** Use the PMM who reviewed the article.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
          - [**Future:** Use the assigned PMM/technical marketer.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**December Performance (Initial Articles):**](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [`ContextRot`: 138 sessions](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [`AI use case, financial services`: 118 sessions](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [**Significance:** Healthy initial traffic, especially for a holiday month.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [**Reporting Enhancements:**](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [**Regional Performance:** Add a section to the dashboard to show international traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [**Conversion Tracking:** Focus on key GA4 events (e.g., `os_book_a_meeting`, `os_aws_trial`) to avoid double-counting.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Team & Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
      - [**POC Change:** Gabby is now the managing editor; Erik is the primary POC.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Moving to biweekly syncs to focus on strategy and KPIs.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fung-Lin:**](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
      - [Assign new articles to PMMs/technical marketers.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
      - [Send primary GA4 conversion event names to Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
      - [Send Gabby's email to Régine for Canva access.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [Retroactively add authors to all published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [Investigate adding regional performance data to the dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/gMnMRb3LcicnT5Yx-m9xk4DTe-UGEzh_?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
